mapper.select:
select soc.*, u.nickname as userName, w.name as workerName, so.order_no as orderNo from service_order_comment soc inner join user u on soc.user_id=u.id inner join worker w on soc.worker_id=w.id inner join service_order so on soc.order_id=so.id
so.order_no like concat('%',#{orderNo},'%')
and u.nickname like concat('%',#{userName},'%')
and w.name like concat('%',#{workerName},'%')
order by soc.create_time desc
